Package com.saxonica.ee.bytecode.map

This package contains classes responsible for generating bytecode for custom mapping functions.

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AtomicSequenceMappingFunction  
    CompiledContextMappingFunction
    Abstract ContextMappingFunction class that must be passed to a ContextMappingIterator.
    CompiledItemMappingFunction  
    ForItemMappingAction
    The ForItemMappingAction supports compilation of a ForExpression.
    ForSequenceMappingAction
    The ForSequenceMappingAction supports compilation of a ForExpression.
    KeyMappingFunction
    Mapping function used by generated bytecode supporting the key() function

Package com.saxonica.ee.bytecode.map Description

This package contains classes responsible for generating bytecode for custom mapping functions.
